"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-674", "name": "Uncontrolled Recursion"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact
Attacker sends many small, valid JSON messages in one TCP frame
 → handleData() recurses once per message; buffer shrinks each call
 → maxBufferSize is never reached; call stack overflows instead
 → A ~47 KB payload is sufficient to trigger RangeError

### Patches

Fixed in `@nestjs/microservices@11.1.19`

### References

Discovered by https://github.com/hwpark6804-gif", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00329, "percentile": 0.24527}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T00:15:09Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40879"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-21T20:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T00:15:09Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nestjs/nest/security/advisories/GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40879", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nestjs/nest/security-advisories/GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nestjs/nest", "summary": "Nest Affected by DoS via Recursive handleData in JsonSocket (TCP Transport)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:16:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hpwf-8g29-85qm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "11.1.19", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@nestjs/microservices"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 11.1.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Nest Affected by DoS via Recursive handleData in JsonSocket (TCP Transport)
